title: To the Wide World
story: Roberto returns to Brazil. Three years later, a young man stands at the airport with one ticket and one old suitcase. It is Tsubasa. He is going abroad — to Brazil, to the home of football. The journey will take one day and one night. His friends come to say goodbye. They wave and wave. Sanae smiles, but there is a tear in her eye. "Do not cry," says Tsubasa. "Distance means nothing. I will chase my dream until I reach it. That is my hope, and my future." Finally, the plane flies up into the clouds. A new adventure begins. Far from home, a player will grow.

words.def: the time that will come — tomorrow, next year, and after.
words.ex: In the future, he will play for Brazil.
words.mn: 《回到未来》=Back to the Future。in the future=将来。

words.ex: He goes abroad to learn football.
words.mn: a+broad(宽的)→去更宽的世界=出国。go abroad / study abroad(留学)。

words.def: the place where planes go up and come down.
words.ex: His friends come to the airport.
words.mn: 拆开就懂:air(空中)+port(港口)→空港。这个词你坐飞机时到处能看到。

words.def: a small piece of paper that lets you go on a plane, a bus, or into a place.
words.ex: One ticket to Brazil, one way.
words.mn: 球票、机票、罚单(交警给的 ticket)全是它。

words.def: a long trip from one place to another.
words.ex: The journey to Brazil takes thirty hours.
words.mn: 词源:jour=一天(法语)→古时一天能走的路=旅程。对比:trip 短途,journey 长途。

words.def: a big box with a handle; you put clothes in it when you travel.
words.ex: All his life is in one old suitcase.
words.mn: 拆开就懂:suit(西装)+case(箱子)→装衣服的箱子=行李箱。

words.def: to move your hand from side to side to say hello or goodbye; also a line of water moving on the sea.
words.ex: They wave until the plane is small in the sky.
words.mn: 一词两义:挥手/海浪——挥手的样子就是一个'浪'。微波炉=microwave(微小的波)。

words.def: a drop of water that comes from your eye when you cry.
words.ex: A tear runs down her face.
words.mn: ⚠️双身份:读 /tɪr/ 是眼泪,读 /ter/ 是'撕'。眼泪=in tears(哭着)。

words.def: to want something good to happen and think it can happen.
words.ex: "I hope we meet again," says Ryo.
words.mn: 对比记:hope 觉得有戏才盼,wish 明知难成也愿。I hope so=希望如此。

words.def: to run after someone or something to catch it.
words.ex: Chase your dream like you chase the ball.
words.mn: 谐音辅助(先读三遍 /tʃeɪs/):'追死'——追到底。chase the dream=追梦。

words.def: to get to a place; to put out your hand to touch something.
words.ex: One day he will reach his dream.
words.mn: reach out=伸手够。到达顶峰=reach the top。比 arrive 多一层'努力够到'的味道。

words.def: how far it is from one place to another.
words.ex: The distance from Japan to Brazil is very big.
words.mn: dist=分开(distant 遥远的)+ance(名词)。异地恋=long-distance relationship。

words.def: after a long time; at the end.
words.ex: Finally, the plane leaves the ground.
words.mn: final(最后的,决赛)+ly。决赛=the final,大结局=the finale。

words.def: an exciting thing you do, often new and a little dangerous.
words.ex: A new adventure begins in Brazil.
words.mn: ad(去)+vent(来,event)→冲向未知的事件=冒险。冒险游戏就叫 Adventure Game。

words.def: to become bigger, taller, or better.
words.ex: Far from home, a player grows fast.
words.mn: grow up=长大成人。庄稼、头发、能力都用 grow。过去式 grew。
